title: arundarbor teres
intro: Arundarbor teres, also known as the Indian mulberry or Arum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Araceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Arundarbor teres include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections.
